events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We need produce exactly one JSON object matching schema. No prose. We must answer based on scenario: frayed/burned webbing in fall protection, rough-complete, component condition installed-defective. Decision fail, risk critical/high. Need estimate measurable condition maybe value 0? It says estimate or interpret measurable condition and state why out of tolerance. We can provide findings, actions, rationale, references.

Need ensure valid JSON fields: decision, risk, work_stage, component_conditions list, percent_complete, value, sound_source, confidence, event_time, rate, order, workable, findings, actions, rationale, references.

Decide numeric percent_complete: rough-complete => maybe 75. value: no numeric reading asked; but measurable cue visible enough to estimate. We can set value as 0 placeholder? Schema default 0. Or could represent severity? Let's keep 0 since no quantitative reading. confidence: high 0.95.

Risk: fall protection webbing compromised => critical. Work stage rough-complete. Conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant, worn, degraded, failed. percent_complete 75.

Findings: webbing frayed/burned, compromised structural integrity, no longer meets ANSI/OSHA requirements. Actions: remove from service immediately, replace defective component, inspect full system, retrain workers, document. Rationale: webbing damage of any degree degrades load capacity and can fail under arrest forces. References: OSHA 1926 Subpart M (Fall Protection), 1910.140 (Personal Fall Protection Systems), ANSI/ASSE Z359.1 maybe? Use provided references.

Make JSON raw.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "critical",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": [
    "installed-defective",
    "non-compliant",
    "worn",
    "degraded",
    "failed"
  ],
  "percent_complete": 75,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Fall protection webbing shows fraying and burn damage",
    "Damaged webbing cannot be trusted to arrest a fall",
    "Component is installed but defective and non-compliant"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove the defective fall protection component from service immediately",
    "Replace damaged webbing or entire lanyard/harness as required by manufacturer",
    "Inspect all connected fall protection equipment before return to use",
    "Document the defect and retrain affected workers"
  ],
  "rationale": "Any frayed or burned webbing on a personal fall arrest system is out of tolerance because it reduces the webbing's strength and may fail under impact load; OSHA and ANSI require removal from service when any damage is present.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926 Subpart M",
    "OSHA 1910.140"
  ]
}
